Class CsvVaccineTypeRepository

java.lang.Object
shelter.repository.csv.CsvVaccineTypeRepository
All Implemented Interfaces:
VaccineTypeRepository
public class CsvVaccineTypeRepository extends Object implements VaccineTypeRepository
CSV-backed implementation of VaccineTypeRepository that persists vaccine type catalog entries to a flat file named vaccine-types.csv. Records are loaded into an in-memory LinkedHashMap at construction time and written back to disk on every save(VaccineType) or delete(String) call.

  • Constructor Summary

  • Constructor Details

    • CsvVaccineTypeRepository

      public CsvVaccineTypeRepository(String dataDir)
      Constructs a new CsvVaccineTypeRepository that reads from and writes to the given directory. If the CSV file does not yet exist it is created with just the header row; existing data is loaded into memory immediately upon construction.
      Parameters:
      dataDir - the path to the directory that contains (or will contain) the CSV file; must not be null or blank
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if dataDir is null or blank
      RuntimeException - if the directory cannot be created or the file cannot be read

  • Method Details

    • save

      public void save(VaccineType vaccineType)
      Persists a new vaccine type or overwrites the existing record with the same ID. Callers are responsible for ensuring the vaccine type is fully constructed before saving.
      Specified by:
      save in interface VaccineTypeRepository
      Parameters:
      vaccineType - the vaccine type to save; must not be null
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if vaccineType is null

    • findById

      public Optional<VaccineType> findById(String id)
      Returns the vaccine type with the given ID, or an empty optional if not found. Does not throw if the ID is absent — callers decide how to handle the missing case.
      Specified by:
      findById in interface VaccineTypeRepository
      Parameters:
      id - the unique identifier to look up; must not be null or blank
      Returns:
      an Optional containing the vaccine type, or empty if not found
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if id is null or blank

    • findByName

      public Optional<VaccineType> findByName(String name)
      Returns the vaccine type with the given name, or an empty optional if not found. Name matching is case-insensitive to prevent near-duplicate entries in the catalog. Name matching is case-insensitive as required by the interface contract.
      Specified by:
      findByName in interface VaccineTypeRepository
      Parameters:
      name - the vaccine type name to look up; must not be null or blank
      Returns:
      an Optional containing the vaccine type, or empty if not found
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if name is null or blank

    • findByApplicableSpecies

      public List<VaccineType> findByApplicableSpecies(Species species)
      Returns all vaccine types applicable to the given species. Returns an empty list if no vaccine types are defined for that species.
      Specified by:
      findByApplicableSpecies in interface VaccineTypeRepository
      Parameters:
      species - the Species to filter by; must not be null
      Returns:
      a list of vaccine types applicable to the specified species
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if species is null

    • findAll

      public List<VaccineType> findAll()
      Returns all vaccine types currently persisted in the store. Returns an empty list if the catalog is empty.
      Specified by:
      findAll in interface VaccineTypeRepository
      Returns:
      a list of all vaccine types

    • delete

      public void delete(String id)
      Removes the vaccine type record with the given ID from the store. Does nothing if no vaccine type with that ID exists.
      Specified by:
      delete in interface VaccineTypeRepository
      Parameters:
      id - the unique identifier of the vaccine type to delete; must not be null or blank
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if id is null or blank
